title: 2026-06-22 Copenhagen Rhubarb Solstice
summary: Copenhagen early-summer set after solstice, using rhubarb red across bike repair, design courtyard tailoring, Nyhavn date, and Islands Brygge harbor-bath resort details.
summaryJa: コペンハーゲンのアルバム。色の軸はルバーブレッド。構成は街歩き、ミュージアム、飲食店、水辺。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman at Copenhagen Superkilen fixing a bicycle chain, wearing a cropped white camp-collar shirt, navy micro-to-mini wrap skort with tailored shorts, rhubarb-red belt pouch, sheer ankle socks, and black slingback flats
images.title: 01 Weekend Superkilen bike chain

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman leaving Designmuseum Danmark courtyard, wearing an off-white sleeveless square-cut top, graphite wide culotte trousers, rhubarb-red sculptural cropped jacket half-worn, sheer smoke knee socks, dark slingback pumps, slim glasses, and black clutch
images.title: 02 Mode Designmuseum red jacket

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman beside Copenhagen Nyhavn canal in long evening light, wearing a black square-neck tank with opaque lining, sheer ivory short-sleeve overshirt tied at the waist, rhubarb-red bias mini skirt, sheer knee-high socks, brown low-heel mules, woven shoulder bag, and red glass ring
images.title: 03 Date Nyhavn canal mini skirt
images.locationDetail: Copenhagen Nyhavn canal in long evening light

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman at Copenhagen Islands Brygge harbor bath after swimming, wearing a black ribbed one-piece swimsuit as bodysuit, loose pale-blue linen shirt, rhubarb-red wrap sarong mini panel over black swim shorts, flat black sandals, and clear waterproof pouch while tying a sandal strap
images.title: 04 Resort Islands Brygge sandal
